name: La Rosita
tagline: Authentic Mexican food, made to order on Sebastopol Road
seoDescription: La Rosita is a family-run Mexican food truck in Santa Rosa's Roseland neighborhood, serving tacos al pastor, fluffy sopes, costillas en salsa verde, and the famous torta cubana — fresh, generous, and affordable, open Sunday through Friday on Sebastopol Road.

sections.eyebrow: Roseland · Sebastopol Rd · Mexican Food Truck
sections.heading: Real Mexican food, made fresh to order
sections.subheading: Tacos al pastor, fluffy sopes, costillas in salsa verde, and our famous torta cubana — generous plates at honest prices, served from the pink truck on Sebastopol Road.

sections.heading: Food worth the trip to Sebastopol Road
sections.intro: A neighborhood food truck that cooks like a kitchen — fresh salsas, tender meats, and portions that fill the plate.

items.title: Made to order
items.body: Tacos, tortas, and sopes are built when you order them — nothing sits under a heat lamp. The sopes come out fluffy, crisp, and warm.

items.title: Salsas that carry the plate
items.body: Bright green and deep red salsas, made in-house, are what regulars come back for — spicy and mild both ready to go.

items.title: Generous and affordable
items.body: Big plates, fair prices. Most meals run $10–$20, and the value is a big reason it's a neighborhood favorite.

items.title: Tacos
items.description: Asada, al pastor, chorizo, and more — served on fresh tortillas with cilantro, onion, radish, and lime. The al pastor is a regular favorite.

items.title: Torta Cubana
items.description: Our signature loaded torta — a big, layered sandwich that's become the dish people come back for. Also offered as a torta hawaiana and a regular torta.

items.title: Sopes
items.description: Thick handmade masa rounds, fried fluffy and crisp, topped with beans, meat, lettuce, and salsa. A house specialty.

items.title: Costillas en Salsa Verde
items.description: Pork ribs simmered tender in green salsa, served with rice and beans — a hearty plate for a bigger appetite.

items.title: Burritos & Quesadillas
items.description: Super burritos, burrito campechano, and super quesadillas — stuffed, wrapped, and ready to go.

items.title: Sides & Extras
items.description: Huaraches, chimichangas, flautas, empanadas, and super nachos round out the menu for the whole table.

sections.heading: Bring the whole family
sections.body: Regulars describe La Rosita as an easy, welcoming place with lots of variety — somewhere you can pull up to the picnic tables with the family and order in English or Spanish.
points: Order in English or Spanish — todos bienvenidos
Dine at the tables or grab it to go

items.quote: The sopes are always fluffy, crisp, and warm, and the salsa is so good. The meat is tender and full of flavor.
items.author: Google reviewer

items.quote: Excelente lugar — puedes ir con toda la familia, hay mucha variedad de comida.
items.author: Google reviewer

items.quote: The best food I've had in Santa Rosa. The employees are kind, the food is great, and the prices are unbeatable.
items.author: Google reviewer

sections.heading: Hungry for tacos?
sections.body: Find the pink truck at 1289 Sebastopol Rd, Santa Rosa. Open Sunday–Friday, 10am–10pm. Call ahead or come order at the window.

sections.heading: From the truck
sections.subheading: Tacos, tortas, sopes, and Mexican classics — all made fresh to order. Prices shown are typical; ask at the window for the day's offerings.

items.title: Asada Taco
items.description: Grilled steak on a fresh tortilla with cilantro, onion, and lime.

items.title: Al Pastor Taco
items.description: Marinated pork with the classic taqueria finish — a house favorite.

items.title: Chorizo Taco
items.description: Savory Mexican chorizo, griddled and tucked into a warm tortilla.

items.title: Sopes
items.description: Handmade masa rounds fried fluffy and crisp, layered with beans, meat, lettuce, and salsa.

items.title: Torta Cubana
items.description: Our loaded signature sandwich, stacked high with meats and fixings.

items.title: Torta Hawaiana
items.description: A sweet-and-savory take with pineapple, on fresh bread.

items.title: Regular Torta
items.description: A classic Mexican sandwich built your way.

items.title: Super Burrito
items.description: A big, fully loaded burrito with your choice of meat.

items.title: Burrito Campechano
items.description: A combination-meat burrito for the indecisive — best of both.

items.title: Super Quesadilla
items.description: An oversized quesadilla loaded with cheese and your choice of filling.

items.title: Costillas en Salsa Verde
items.description: Pork ribs simmered tender in green salsa with rice and beans.

items.title: Huarache
items.description: A long masa base topped with beans, meat, and salsa.

items.title: Chimichanga
items.description: A crisp, golden fried burrito with all the fixings.

items.title: Flautas
items.description: Rolled and fried crisp, served with salsa and crema.

items.title: Empanadas
items.description: Hand-filled and fried — a perfect snack or side.

items.title: Super Nachos
items.description: A pile of chips loaded with beans, meat, cheese, and salsa.

items.a: We're at 1289 Sebastopol Rd in Santa Rosa's Roseland neighborhood, with picnic-table seating under the canopy.
We're open Sunday through Friday, 10:00am–10:00pm, and closed on Saturday.
Yes — you can order La Rosita for delivery or pickup through DoorDash and Grubhub, or call us directly.

items.q: Do you have spicy and mild options?
items.a: We do. Our green and red salsas come spicy and mild, so you can dial the heat up or down.

sections.heading: Come order at the window
sections.body: 1289 Sebastopol Rd, Santa Rosa. Open Sun–Fri 10am–10pm.

sections.heading: A neighborhood taquería on wheels
sections.subheading: Fresh, made-to-order Mexican food served from a pink truck on Sebastopol Road — generous, affordable, and welcoming to everyone.

sections.heading: Real food, fair prices, friendly faces
body: La Rosita is a family-run Mexican food truck parked on Sebastopol Road in Santa Rosa's Roseland neighborhood. It's the kind of place neighbors line up at for fluffy, crisp sopes, tacos al pastor, and a torta cubana stacked high enough to share.

What keeps people coming back is simple: everything is made fresh to order, the green and red salsas are made in-house, and the portions are generous for the price. Order in English or Spanish, pull up a seat at the picnic tables, and you've got a quick, satisfying meal that regulars call some of the best in Santa Rosa.

sections.heading: On Sebastopol Road in Roseland
sections.body: Look for the pink truck and the canopy with picnic tables — that's home. We're easy to find, easy to park at, and open most of the week.
points: Dine in at the tables or take it to go

sections.heading: Visit La Rosita
sections.blurb: Find the pink truck at 1289 Sebastopol Rd, Santa Rosa, CA 95407, or call (707) 955-9773. Open Sunday–Friday, 10am–10pm; closed Saturday.
